title: Why You're Hungrier After Sleeping Wrong (And What to Do About It)
excerpt: Poor sleep doesn't just make you tired—it literally makes you hungrier. Research shows sleep deprivation disrupts hormones, increases junk food cravings, and can add 500+ calories to your daily intake.

title: Why Rest Days Are Not Lazy: The Science of Recovery
excerpt: Most people think rest days mean you're falling behind. Science says otherwise. Understanding recovery is the difference between progressing and overtraining.

title: The 5 AM Advantage: How to Build a Morning Routine for Peak Performance
excerpt: Discover how to create a science-backed morning routine that boosts energy, focus, and productivity without burnout. Practical steps for high achievers who want sustainable success.

title: Digital Boundaries: How to Use Technology Without Letting It Use You
excerpt: Learn how to create mindful technology boundaries that protect your attention, reduce anxiety, and help you reclaim control over your digital life.

title: Beyond the Hype: Building Sustainable Wellness Habits That Actually Stick
excerpt: Stop chasing wellness trends and build habits that last. Learn the science of sustainable behavior change and create a wellness routine you can maintain for life.
